refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: YATES Calculates main and interaction effects using Yate's algorithm.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Calling Sequence

listitem.para: a (n-1)-by-k matrix of doubles, identification matrix of main and interaction effects.

a n-by-1 vector of average response, main effects and interaction effects. EF(1,:) is the average response and EF(2:end,:) contain the main effects and interaction effects corresponding to the vector ID.
a n-by-1 or 1-by-n vector of calculated response from a two-level complete factorial design in standard order
sort the effects (optional), a boolean operator %T. Default is %F.

refsection.title: Bibliography
refsection.para: Box, G.E.P, Hunter, W.G. and Hunter, J.S. (1978)
Statistics for experimenters, John Wiley & Sons, pp 342
This function is adopted from the WAFO toolbox :
